requestedAction: Schedule owner-approved Instagram posts for @agdigitalz within an exact approved schedule.
scope: If converted into an active approved lock later, this may authorize only the exact schedule ID and exact post list approved by the owner. It does not authorize OAuth, analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, unapproved posts, paid tools, credential storage in repo, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution changes.
revocationPath: This approval is revoked, expired, cancelled, or invalidated when the owner revokes it, expiration passes, the schedule ID or post list differs from the exact approved scope, account state is revoked, expired, or blocked, or analytics, DMs/comments, n8n activation, paid tools, domain/DNS, Lead Gen, AI Receptionist, or Constitution scope appears.

evidence.reference: Owner must approve one exact future Instagram schedule before scheduling.
